patch:
diff --git a/comfy/text_encoders/llama.py b/comfy/text_encoders/llama.py
index 0d07ac8..96e86fb 100644
--- a/comfy/text_encoders/llama.py
+++ b/comfy/text_encoders/llama.py
@@ -177,7 +177,7 @@ class Gemma3_4B_Config:
     num_key_value_heads: int = 4
     max_position_embeddings: int = 131072
     rms_norm_eps: float = 1e-6
-    rope_theta = [10000.0, 1000000.0]
+    rope_theta = [1000000.0, 10000.0]
     transformer_type: str = "gemma3"
     head_dim = 256
     rms_norm_add = True
@@ -387,7 +387,14 @@ class TransformerBlockGemma2(nn.Module):
         if self.transformer_type == 'gemma3':
             if self.sliding_attention:
                 if x.shape[1] > self.sliding_attention:
-                    logging.warning("Warning: sliding attention not implemented, results may be incorrect")
+                    sliding_mask = torch.ones(x.shape[1], x.shape[1], device=x.device, dtype=torch.bool)
+                    sliding_mask = torch.triu(sliding_mask, diagonal=-self.sliding_attention)
+                    window_mask = torch.zeros((x.shape[1], x.shape[1]), device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype)
+                    window_mask.masked_fill_(~sliding_mask, float("-inf"))
+                    if attention_mask is not None:
+                        attention_mask = attention_mask + window_mask
+                    else:
+                        attention_mask = window_mask
                 freqs_cis = freqs_cis[1]
             else:
                 freqs_cis = freqs_cis[0]

_extraction.source: messages_replay against original_session.json (post Fix-B WRITE/EDIT tool aliases)

_sync_note: Auto-synced 2026-05-14 after Fix B (WRITE/EDIT tool aliases) recovered this canonical. Edit source, not this copy.

_review.note: exact fidelity, schema complete, hdr=1/1 +9/-2 matches numstat, file aligned with test.sh, 0 warnings
